name: BrightView Holdings, Inc.
business: We are the largest provider of commercial landscaping services in the United States, with revenues approximately 4 times those of our next largest commercial landscaping competitor. We provide commercial landscaping services, ranging from landscape maintenance and enhancements to tree care and landscape development.

exposures.sentence: Any failure, inadequacy, interruption, security failure or breach of our information technology systems, whether owned by us or outsourced or managed by third parties, could harm our ability to effectively operate our business and could have a material adverse effect on our business.
Our future success depends on our ability to attract, retain and maintain positive relations with workers.

Our landscape development services have been, and in the future may be, adversely impacted by fluctuations, declines and delays in the new commercial construction sector, as well as in spending on repair and upgrade activities.

tamClaims.claim: The commercial landscape maintenance and snow removal market is $124 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: As the number one player in the highly attractive and growing $124 billion commercial landscape maintenance and snow removal market, we believe our size and scale present several compelling value propositions for our customers, and allow us to offer a single-source landscaping services solution to a diverse group of commercial customers across the United States.

tamClaims.claim: The combined commercial landscaping and snow removal industry is expected to grow at a 2.9% CAGR from 2021 through 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: the combined industry is expected to grow at a 2.9% CAGR from 2021 through 2028, as depicted in the chart below:
